user_prompt: Ticket: 'Need help understanding my invoice for May.' Route this to the right team and assign priority.
actual_output:
**Priority:** MEDIUM  
**Category:** Billing - Invoice Inquiry  
**Routing:** Billing Team  

**Draft Response:**  

Hi there,  

I'm sorry for any confusion with your May invoice—billing questions can be tricky to sort through. I'd be happy to help clarify it for you.  

To get started:  
1. Could you reply with your invoice number (usually at the top, e.g., INV-XXXXX) or the email address associated with your account?  
2. In the meantime, you can view a detailed breakdown in your account dashboard: [Log in here](https://app.yourcompany.com/dashboard/billing) > Invoices > May 2023.  

If it's a specific line item or charge you're questioning, let me know more details, and I'll pull up the exact info or connect you with our billing specialist right away.  

Looking forward to your reply!  

Best,  
Compass  
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly followed its instructions to prioritize, categorize, and draft a response for the support ticket provided by the user.
